case_title: FUND RECOVERY SERVICES INC DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE VS. HAVANA CIGAR & EXCHANGE, LLC A CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE ACCOUNT SUED ON OPEN BOOK/NO WRITTEN CONTRACT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES INC DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS ("ARMS")

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES INC DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS ("ARMS") RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAVANA CIGAR & EXCHANGE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA WINE & CELLAR CAFE BLACK, DANIEL B CANALE, LINDA $1,309.80 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $131.70 INTEREST, $196.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,038.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES INC DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS ("ARMS")
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-04-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KAPPOS, STEPHEN M SUBSTITUTED FOR HEAD, ANTHONY LEE AS ATTORNEY FOR FUND RECOVERY SERVICES INC DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS ("ARMS")

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES INC DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS ("ARMS") AS TO DEFENDANT HAVANA CIGAR & EXCHANGE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA WINE & CELLAR CAFE BLACK, DANIEL B CANALE, LINDA
